name: AI Programmer
description: Runs codex for coding tasks and returns a compact structured result.

codexCommand.description: Host codex CLI command to run, default: codex

workspaceDir.description: Dedicated workspace for ai-programmer. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ai-programmer and does not inherit the orchestrator workspace.

allowTaskWorkspaceOverride.description: Allow callers to override ai-programmer's workspaceDir per tool invocation. Disabled by default so orchestrator requests stay inside the dedicated ai-programmer workspace.

command.description: Executable path inside the sandbox container. Defaults to codex.

useHostNetwork.description: Share host network namespace (Linux only). Lets the container reach 127.0.0.1 proxy directly, avoiding Docker bridge stream-disconnect issues.
